title: EV Parking & Charging
summary: Evaluates whether the facility has planned, coordinated, and maintained capabilities to manage EV parking/charging hazards in parking areas.

question_families.title: Plan integration
question_families.intent: Plans and procedures explicitly address EV parking/charging hazards and responsibilities.
question_prompts: Do facility emergency plans and procedures address EV parking/charging hazards for the site?
Are roles and responsibilities defined for facility actions during an EV parking/charging incident?

question_families.title: Facility response capability
question_families.intent: The facility has an established capability to manage an EV fire/incident prior to responder arrival.
question_prompts: Does the facility have an established capability to suppress or control an EV-related fire event in EV parking/charging areas until responders arrive?
Are staff actions and decision points defined for an EV parking/charging incident prior to responder arrival?

question_families.title: Responder coordination
question_families.intent: Coordination with primary fire response agency for EV incidents is established and maintained.
question_prompts: Has the facility coordinated with the primary fire response agency to confirm EV incident response considerations for this site (access, staging, constraints)?
Are EV parking/charging locations documented to support emergency responder access and operations?

question_families.title: Layout, separation, and cascading effects
question_families.intent: Parking layout provides separation or controls to reduce cascading fire spread impacts.
question_prompts: Do EV parking/charging locations provide sufficient separation or layout controls to reduce the likelihood of cascading fire spread to adjacent vehicles, building openings, or critical areas?

ofc_template_bank.text_template: Ensure facility emergency plans and procedures explicitly address EV parking/charging hazards, roles, and response actions for the site.
Establish and maintain a documented facility capability to manage EV parking/charging incident conditions prior to responder arrival, including defined staff actions and decision points.
Coordinate with the primary fire response agency to confirm EV incident response considerations for this site, including responder access, staging needs, and operational constraints.
Implement site layout and parking-area controls that reduce the likelihood of cascading fire spread impacts from EV parking/charging locations to adjacent vehicles and critical building areas.
